name: index generation: INDEX.md per-file row includes rule count (3 rules → "rules: 3")
command:
mkdir -p tree/google tree/_meta && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
%s
recommended_set: []
all_set: [g-x-001, g-x-002, g-x-003]
' "$(for i in 1 2 3; do printf '  - {id: g-x-%03d, name: x, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: false, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: x, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
' "$i"; done)" > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-index "$PWD/tree/_meta/INDEX.md" && grep -E 'rules: 3' tree/_meta/INDEX.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
